recommendations.title: If I Were a Boy
recommendations.overview: Jeanne wakes up one morning and her life is about to take a funny turn, at first sight nothing has changed in her - to a small detail.

recommendations.title: The 400 Blows

recommendations.title: Budapest
recommendations.overview: Two best friends stuck in boring jobs become bachelor party planners in Budapest.

recommendations.title: Murder Party

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part III
recommendations.overview: This time, there's no wedding. No bachelor party. What could go wrong, right? But when the Wolfpack hits the road, all bets are off.

recommendations.title: Siren
recommendations.overview: A bachelor party becomes a savage fight for survival when the groomsmen unwittingly unleash a fabled predator upon the festivities.

recommendations.title: Dead Man on Campus
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates venture out to identify a fellow student, who is most likely to commit suicide as it will help them pass the semester.
